news.title: Changes to the board of directors of Ascencio Management SA
Ardmore Shipping Reports Newbuilding Options Exercise
CAPITAL INCREASE - Publication of the new denominator in accordance with Article 15 of the Law of 2 May 2007
Ascencio announces the successful completion of its €15 million capital increase as part of the financing of the acquisition of the “Espace Shopping Hydrion” retail park
Ascencio continues its growth with the acquisition of “Espace Shopping Hydrion” in Arlon (Belgium)  &  the launch of a capital increase via  accelerated bookbuilding
